sample_comments.positives:
Шикарный отель!
Огромный номер - вилла, где очень тихо и комфортно. 
Отличный завтрак, классная территория, бассейн. 
Песочек на пляже в разы лучше, чем на любом пляже Нячанга. 
Классный пирс с баром... где очень приятно посидеть с койктейлем вечером, любуюсь видами на город и парк WinWonder.
Резюмируя - действительно luxury!
sample_comments.negatives:
Был все же один минус...очень странный (как не продумали?)
В номере стоит большой холодильник, что плюс, но то, что он жутко громко тарахтит и шумит...
Нарушает идиллию тишины!
Я решил просто - отключил.
И все опять стало идеально!

sample_comments.title: Review of a beachfront pool villa for 3 nights.
sample_comments.text: We stayed for three nights including the Akoya Spa promotion. The beach view from the window is very nice Our kids were excited to play in the pool, but during our stay from January 16 to 19, it rained, was cloudy, and was very windy, so we couldn't do much water play ㅜㅜ We didn't even get to use the private pool once... Honestly, even if the weather had been good, I think we wouldn't have used the private pool because it was small and had a lot of leaves and debris. The public pool is good enough. The Akoya Spa, listening to the sound of the waves, was a very exotic and relaxing time. However, it might be a bit disappointing for those expecting a vigorous massage. Even though I requested a strong one, I still felt it was a bit lacking. The experience of traveling to Vinpearl Island by speedboat and cable car seemed to create special memories for the kids. By the way, if you don't have high expectations, the breakfast was decent. There weren't too many options, but most of the food was above average, and I ate a lot of mangoes ㅋㅋㅋ
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. Dongki,

At Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang, we value and treasure the insights shared by our distinguished guests, and we extend our sincere gratitude for your feedback.

It brings us immense joy to know that your stay was filled with comfort and relaxation, and that our team delivered an experience that left a positive and lasting impression.

We eagerly await the opportunity to welcome you back to our peaceful and luxurious retreat.

Warmest regards,
Hotel Management of Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang

sample_comments.positives: Супер отель

sample_comments.title: Vimparland
sample_comments.text: I made this reservation with the intention of going to Vinwonder with my family. The room had a pool, and it was beautiful and comfortable. There were no issues with the facilities, and the staff were all very friendly. The disappointing part was that the gondola and the large pool were closed for maintenance and could not be used. Boats run frequently 24 hours, so it wasn't a problem, but it might be inconvenient if you plan to go to the city. There is a cart service available, but considering the waiting time, it takes about 40 minutes from the room to reach the city. Dining at Vinpearl Land is possible, but perhaps due to the season, there were few establishments open, and since there was only one place in the hotel, I didn't feel like eating much inside. Although I didn't go into the sea, it seems more appropriate to stay there to go to Vinwonder rather than enjoying sea activities or the pool. Children under preschool age can stay for free, but there is an additional fee for older children, which had to be paid at check-in. It seemed like they wanted to receive a hotel rating, as four staff members asked for reviews during my stay (laughs).

sample_comments.positives:
Очень понравился отель и всё в нём! Обслуживание на высоте! В ресторане не было в меню ничего для нашего ребёнка. Сказали, что могут приготовить всё что угодно (например пасту карбонару или картофельное пюре с котлетой). Выбрали пюре с котлетой. Все наелись, ребёнок доволен. Море и пляж возле отеля значительно отличается от пляжа в Нячанге. Море прозрачное, дно просматривается даже на большой глубине, песок на пляже как с картинки. Входил в стоимость 1 массаж 60мин в день на каждого взрослого члена семьи. Массаж и сервис очень понравился!
Таких шикарных завтраков не встречали ни в одном отеле Нячанга и Таиланда. Впечатлил огромный выбор еды и её качество!

sample_comments.title: Proud and kind staff with aging facilities.
sample_comments.text:
The staff is really proactive and friendly. The breakfast may not have a lot of variety, but everything is delicious and of good quality. A sudden allergic reaction was treated by the on-site nurse and it calmed down. Of course, it was free!

But while the human resources are great, the facility remodeling is now necessary. There's a leak from the ceiling that needs fixing, and there's a spark coming from the hairdryer that needs repair. Also, since it's environmentally friendly, bugs come in quite often, so we keep the homekeeper on. I hope they'll consider remodeling even if the prices go up. The staff might spend all day fixing the facilities.

sample_comments.positives: Сделали бесплатный апгрейт виллы. Очень все число , все необходимое есть в доме . Свой маленький бассейн. Тишина , только бегают белочки и птички поют. Красивая территория и пляж . Очень вкусный и разнообразный завтрак . Персонал улыбчивый и дружелюбный . Вызвать машину можно в любое время

sample_comments.title: Relax and enjoy

Picture perfect paradise island. 
A great place to relax. 
The breakfast was amazing. But we did not try the dinning restaurant.

sample_comments.title: Идеальный отдых.
sample_comments.positives:
Шикарная локация, спокойное , теплое море. Идеально для детей. Большая, очень чистая и ухоженная территория. Очень большой бассейн .До пляжа от любого бунгало идти от 30 секунд до 2 х минут максимум. Вход в море очень пологий, желтовато - белый песок . Обученный, вежливый персонал. Довольно богатый завтрак. Идеальная тишина вечером. Свои маленькие бассейны в большинстве номеров. Бесплатный доступ на канатную дорогу и катера для Нячанга. До центра города, вместе с канаткой или катером и такси примерно 20 минут. В двух минутах езды на электрокаре находится Харбор, где находятся картинг, рыночки, магазины и несколько ресторанов. 
Если не хочется или незачем ехать в Нячанг, можно хорошо провести вечер в Харборе.
sample_comments.negatives: Подушки не очень удобные.

sample_comments.title: The conclusion is good!! Recommendation.
sample_comments.text:
First, luxury resort down service! The staff is very friendly and the service quality is excellent. Not only are they friendly, but they also handle tasks efficiently. Especially the restaurants and performances recommended by Henry had high satisfaction! The small talk every time we passed by also made me feel closer to them.

Second, you can use the facilities of other hotel resorts as well, not just Vinpearl Luxury. The whole island belongs to the Vinpearl Group, so you can access all the facilities within the island. I enjoyed the restaurants and tennis courts of other hotels! Of course, there are additional charges for things other than the restaurants.

Third, unlimited cart service. Although the extensive area of Vinpearl means that the facilities are not all connected, it was convenient to use the cart that comes every time you call.

Fourth, Vinpearl Luxury feels more special because there are fewer guests compared to other hotels on the island. With fewer people at the pool, breakfast buffet, and private beach, you can truly enjoy a sense of calm and relaxation.

In conclusion, it was great!!!!!!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. stella, 

First and foremost, it was a great pleasure to welcome you in Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang and it is our sincere wish and conviction that you become our loyal guest from now on.

Thank you very much for taking the time to write this review with reference to your stay at Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang. We have been delighted to read your precious comments that you have enjoyed all aspects of your stay with us and my colleagues lived up to the expectations and was able to provide the true Vinpearl experience to you.

We are looking forward to welcoming you back in the nearest possible time and wishing that your next farewell will be fuller of unforgettable moments than the first one. 

Yours very truly,
Hotel Management of Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Второй раз приезжали в этот отель, очень нам нравится его камерность и тишина. Нам в виде комплимента повысили категорию виллы, было очень приятно! Персонал радушный, создается ощущение, что приехали погостить к друзьям)

sample_comments.title: A resort that created unforgettable memories with my daughter!
sample_comments.text: I checked in at the Vinpearl pier and arrived comfortably and pleasantly at the room. True to its name, it was luxurious, and the service was exceptional compared to other resorts while waiting for the shuttle bus at Vinpearl Harbor. Additionally, being close to Vinpearl Harbor saved time on arrivals and departures. There were a lot of Chinese and Vietnamese people at the Marriott, and after the VinWonders TaTa show, the chaos to catch the Marriott shuttle made me think that I made a good decision staying at Vinpearl Luxury. I was satisfied with everything, from the friendliness of the staff to the facilities. However, I did feel a bit uncomfortable with the enormous leaves and bugs that had fallen into the pool inside the room.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. RAN, 

Thank you for sharing your experience at the Vinpearl Luxury, Nha Trang. With a mission to provide superior customer service, we take great pride in serving your needs and are delighted to hear that we have met your expectations.

As a valued customer, your feedback will be shared with the team to continue to inspire and motivate them to deliver exceptional customer service.

Our team looks forward to welcome you back to ''your home away from home''. 

Yours very truly,
Hotel Management of Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang
sample_comments.room_type: Garden View Villa with King Bed and Private Pool

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Это лучший отель на острове!
Персонал очень заботливый, сервис на высоте. Виллы просто потрясающие. Нам бесплатно улучшили категорию виллы и заселили в 2х этажную с видом на сад. В каждой вилле свой личный бассейн, но так как вилла окружена деревьями- с них в бассейн постоянно падают листики/веточки. Персонал приходит в течение 2-5 минут, чистят бассейн, но через минут 10 листья снова насыпаются) было бы замечательно в каждом номере предусмотреть сачок какой-нибудь, чтоб самостоятельно очистить воду перед купанием)
Пляж....это отдельная любовь! Белый песок, бирюзовая прозрачная вода, инстаграммные локации и кнопки вызова официантов на каждом лежаке. Волн нет, даже загар по другому как будто бы ложится))
Кухня и бары- тоже хорошие. Еда не прям вау, но очень неплохо. Мы попросили плавающий завтрак в бассейн - так нам принесли 2 гигантские корзины)))
Бар на пирсе с видом на закат- супер, идти туда нужно в 17.00 провожать солнышко, и около 21.00 смотреть шоу и салют с Винвандерс. Но там очень ветрено, накиньте обязательно что нибудь сверху купальника)) и кстати возле пирса еще много рыбок. Детки наверняка будут в восторге.
Короче, не раздумывая приезжайте сюда! Очень рекомендую!

sample_comments.title: The best vacation spot to relax and heal in peace.
sample_comments.text:
If you dislike crowded places and a lot of movement, this is the perfect place for you. In particular, the staff is very friendly, creating a feeling of being well taken care of, and the room cleaning service is provided frequently, even several times a day after you've gone out. The breakfast is at a very excellent level, and while it became a bit repetitive by the third day, I was still quite satisfied. The quality of room service food is above average, and the massage services are especially satisfying. The accommodation is spacious, comfortable, and has a charming interior that increases satisfaction. 

One downside is the cleanliness of the private pool; it would be better to use the public pool instead. The public pool has few people, a good environment, and great views. I requested cleaning for the private pool upon check-in on the first day of my 4-day stay, but they informed me they would clean it on the afternoon of the third day, which I declined. The private pool often gets cluttered with leaves and fruit, and from the evening onwards, I hesitated to use it due to mosquitoes and toads. Small lizards can often be seen inside and outside the accommodation. 

There are not many dining options on Vinpearl Island like in Nha Trang, so it's a good idea to plan a city schedule before and after your stay on Vinpearl Island. Overall, I was very satisfied with the accommodation and would definitely like to go back.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms.HEO

We are truly heartened to receive your generous review of the Vinpearl Luxury, Nha Trang. Thank you for letting us know how much you enjoyed it, we are especially pleased that you felt well-looked after and our staff made your stay enjoyable.

The entire team looks forward to the pleasure of welcoming you back to the Vinpearl Luxury, Nha Trang soon.

Yours very truly,

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Отдыхали в отделе с 13 по 20 декабря 2025 года. Приехали в него из Ня Чанга ( первые 7 дней отдыхали на севере Ня Чанга), отлично встретили, перевезли на катере ( поездка 8-10 минут), по прибытию на пристань быстро разместили в открытый автобус маленький и довезли до самого отеля. На ресепшен русскоговорящая менеджер Алиса рассказала нам об отеле и выдала карту от номера, все очень быстро и комфортно. Главное достоинство отеля, конечно., пляж, он с белоснежным песком, шириной около 20 метров и прекрасным заходом в море. Вода прозрачная, плавают рыбки, не мелко, все - для отличного купания! Рядом с пляжем есть огромный бассейн с хорошей глубиной 1,8 м и есть места для малышей, там более мелко. Но мы в основном купались в море - оно шикарное! Завтраки отличные, есть все, что душе угодно, и каша, яйца в разных вариантах, большой выбор фруктов ( манго, арбуз, дыня, маракуйя, папайя, бананы), йогурты, сухие завтраки, сыр, нарезка мясная, рис, лапша, мясо, курица итд Все очень вкусно. На улице готовят вьетнамский суп- очень вкусный! Номера в отеле все с собственным бассейном, что очень удобно. Номера большие, жаль нет русскоязычного канала на телевизоре. До Ня Чанга бесплатно можно ездить любое количество раз на катере или канатной дороге, все очень быстро и удобно. Посетили парк развлечений на острове - очень понравилось, для гостей отеля скидка на билеты в парк 10%. Одного дня нам хватило. Стоимость на взрослого 855 000 донгов, это примерно 2500 рублей. В отеле очень тихо и спокойно, в основном русские и корейцы. Есть и европейцы, но их немного. Для семей с детьми - отель идеально подходит. На обед пару раз ходили в ресторан отеля, вкусно, но дороговато. Чаще всего питались на пристани, там отличная зона фуд-корта, особенно хороши бургеры на набережной! Персонал отеля очень вежливый, всегда во всем помогут. До ресепшен можно было добраться на багги, набрав цифру 1 на телефоне и попросив забрать из номера, все четко, быстро и удобно. Отдыхом в отеле очень довольны!
sample_comments.negatives: Такого нет

sample_comments.title: Highly recommended, you must stay here!
sample_comments.text:
This stay completely exceeded my expectations! Definitely worth the value. The best service we have ever had from every staff member we encountered! The room was super spacious and clean, completely equipped with a full size fridge, stovetop, shower, double sinks, soaking tub, and tv. 

Everything was top tier from the friendly and accommodating staff, the complimentary tram rides around the island, speedboat and cable car service, and there are discounts to vin wonders, also conveniently located on the island. 

Perks of having access to the resort's private beachfront made it feel like we were the only ones on the island as the other beaches can tend to get crowded. However, you can get a tram ride to the other vinpearl hotels to enjoy their restaurants and beaches as well.

Our favorite part was the massage, not only because it was the best massages we ever had but also because of the ambience of being in a private villa over the water. We were so deeply relaxed that we fell asleep to the sound of the waves washing up on shore. 

I would highly recommend to stay here if you visit Nha Trang! Don't forget to order the vietnamese coffee at the complimentary breakfast buffet!

sample_comments.positives:
По фотографиям казалось, что отель уставший. В действительности сильно лучше, чем на фотографиях. Пляж пустой, бассейн пустой, ощущение, что все люди проводят время в парке. Я бронировала три ночи с посещением парка, но мы были в нём один день, когда заселялись, в остальные дни отдыхали в отеле и иногда ездили в городок, куда не нужен пропуск, чтобы поужинать или купить алкоголь в магазине. 

Очень вкусная еда в баре у моря, рекомендую!

sample_comments.title: Recommended for those looking for a quiet and tranquil resort
sample_comments.text:
Because it is located on an island, accessibility to the airport is not very good, but it is the best option for those who want to have a quiet vacation away from the busy tourist areas. However, it is also suitable for tourism, with amusement parks such as VinWonders readily available. 

The facility feels a bit old, but appears to be properly maintained. The staff are friendly, and the way they understand and consider the customers' situations is impressive.

sample_comments.title: Рекаомендую
sample_comments.positives:
Абсолютно райский остров, птицы, белки, ящерицы. Чистый пустынный пляж. чудесное СПА, просто сказка. Бассейн большой. Есть бар на пирсе , атмосферный по ночам. В 21-00 с пляжа можно наблюдать шоу. Территория довольно большая и прибранная,
Чудный остров, прилетаете в аэропорт Камрань, берете такси до отеля Vinpearl. На месте вам сделают фото (чтобы на остров и с острова ходить через турникет), тут же в холе ждете лодку, ходит каждые 30 мин, есть вода, комфортные диваны. Переправитесь на остров, там скажите обслуживающему персоналу название отеля и вас на каре увезут. Заселяетесь-получаете удовольствие, Вам с острова и на остров свободный доступ сколько угодно, можно на лодке (круглосуточно), можно на канатке ( с9-00 до 21-00) . Мы были в октябре, погода хороша, ночами дожди бывают, но и народу нет. По отелю: завтраки нормальные азиатские с вьетнамской спецификой, мне нравится, кто не любит азиатскую кухню, возможно не так вдохновит. Спа-отдельное удовольствие, массажистки сильные знающие, а атмолсфера, просто райская: домики на сваях на воде, музыка, цветы , масла ....
sample_comments.negatives: Ну если уж совсем придираться. В номерах запах старой затхлой мебели. Ну и раннее заселение платно (185$), мы много путешествуем и много где часа за 3-4 можно заселиться бесплатно...

sample_comments.title: 최고의 휴양지
sample_comments.text:
한마디로 모든것이 최고였습니다. 아이둘과 함께 4박5일 비치프론트에서 지냈습니다.
직원들이 모두 친절한 것은 당연, 음식도 맛있고 수영장도 크고 깨끗하고 쾌적합니다. 바다에는 두 걸음만 걸어 들어가면 물고기가 많이보입니다.
마사지도 너무 시원하고 분위기도 최고였습니다. 마사지가 너무 좋아서 저와 아내 번갈아 아이들 돌보면서까지 매일매일 받았어요.
매일 룸서비스 시키고, 수영장에서 맥주 피자 시켜먹고 정말 최고의 힐링여행이었어요.
저희는 할로윈데이가 겹쳐서 저녁 할로윈 디너파티도 너무너무 훌륭했습니다.
다만 욕실에 작은 계단 같은것이 없어서 아이들이 개수대를 사용하기 어려웠고, 객실에 파우더룸이 없는게 조금 아쉬웠습니다.
저런 사소한것을 빼면 모든것이 좋았기때문에 우리가족은 휴가때마다 여기를 오려고 생각중입니다.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful luxury resort with fantastic service
sample_comments.text:
Loved this resort, you have everything you could possibly want for a relaxing break. Gorgeous clean beach, large rooms, well kept grounds, a truly luxurious stay. The best thing about Vinpearl luxury was the level of service we received. We felt right at home. 

We stayed for a week which was perfect. As there is the huge amusement park and water park on the island you can't really get bored here. One morning I played a round of golf at the nearby course and though pricey, it was a stunning course. I could not recommend Vinpearl Luxury more.
sample_comments.positives: The staff definitely, nothing was too much trouble

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Прекрасное место с действительно белым пляжем, вкусными завтраками, ухоженной территорией и вежливым персоналом. Удобно организован трансфер до города на скоростной лодке или на канатной дороге. За счет того, что отель располагается со стороны острова, которая находится ближе к материку, на пляже практически не бывает волн (особенно важно, у кого маленькие дети). На территории отеля нет опасной живности.
sample_comments.negatives: Не каждый день пополняли минбар. Не очень качественно убирают номера. При отеле нет детской площадки.

The pool is also relatively small for swimming.
sample_comments.positives: Nice private beach

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Отель отличный, персонал готов всегда и в любом вопросе помочь!

sample_comments.title: First Nha Trang resort! A place I want to visit again.
sample_comments.text: It was my first visit to Nha Trang, so I chose the resort carefully! I wanted to relax comfortably with my boyfriend, so I chose the Vinpearl Luxury Pool Villa, and it was a decision I don't regret. All the staff were really friendly, and there was someone who spoke Korean! The swimming pool was under construction, so we used the resort's pool, and there was no inconvenience since we took a buggy to the resort! I was feeling unwell from the water change, but there was a clinic at the reception where I got medication prescribed. The staff were really kind... (I went late at night, but there was a nurse, and it felt like a 24/7 service! It might not be the case though). The staff kept checking on how I was feeling... It was a resort worth every penny! I booked with a massage included, and receiving a massage over the sea was wonderful; I really healed with my boyfriend! There were no bugs at all! Just be careful of flying bugs like mosquitoes outside! I would love to use this place again next time. Haha!

sample_comments.title: Отель соответствует своим звездам, есть незначительные минусы которые описал выше
sample_comments.positives:
1.Персонал. Невероятно приветливый и дружелюбный персонал. Не особо хорошо знаю английский, всё объяснили, подсказали, через переводчик всё переводили и делали все возможное для моего понимания. Всегда добрые, улыбчивые, обслуживание 10/10.

2.Вилла. Сама вилла прекрасная, есть все удобства, все отлично. Вопросов нет, пару мелких минусов которые будут ниже.

3.Трансфер до отеля и по территории невероятно удобен. Пришли в Ресепшен, нам провели регистрацию и далее посадили на катер. После катера нас встретил мини автобус как на гольфе и отвез в основной отель. Там нам все объяснили и провели оплату. Если нужно куда-то вас доставить или чем-то помочь, сотрудник приезжает меньше чем за 5 минут, моментально. 

4.Пляж аналог Мальдив, очень красивый, классный песок и чистая водичка. Одно наслаждение :)

5.Медицина. У Жены болело горло, попросили таблетку или леденец. Нас отвезли в кабинет доктора, женщина спросила есть ли у нас аллергия, какие симптомы и много вопросов, видно что хороший специалист. Спустя небольшой диалог выдала таблетки, леденцы и сироп. Рад что подошли так трепетно к вроде бы несерьезной болезни, хотя могли просто дать таблетку и сказать пока. Но нет, обслуживание на высшем уровне.

6.Еда. В холодильник номера кладут 2 воды, kitkat, чипсы, 4 пива, 1 алкогольный напиток, забыл его название и cola + sprite, ну и конечно же тарелку фруктов.

7.Завтрак. Завтрак вполне разнообразен. 3 сока. Чай/кофе. Много еды, фрукты. Все отлично. Вопросов нет. Для отеля 6звезд не прям большой фуршет, но лучше чем в любом отеле котором был тут.
sample_comments.negatives:
1.Бассейн. Бассейн в вилле очень холодный, так как находится в зарослях и солнце практически не попадает. Также бассейн всегда можно сказать грязный. Плавают всякие жуки и листья. Но, от этого никак не уйти. Просто природа делает свое дело, бассейн под открытым небом, падают листья с деревьев, также и насекомые. Поэтому это проблема не обслуживания. А просто природы:)

2.Телевизор. Телевизор большой, на двух этажах. Но у него очень глупая система android, при попытке установить браузер из play market телевизор просто намертво зависал. 

3.Романтический ужин. В чем заключается минус. После оплаты виллы, для пар предлагают сделать романтический ужин. Думаю было бы разумнее предложить ужин мужчине наедине, чтобы это был сюрприз для девушки. Но, нам предложили его тогда, когда мы были вместе. Немного нет в этом романтики и сюрприза для девушки. В целом оформление, ужин, место, все круто и вкусно. Незначительный минус, скорее даже рекомендация.

4.Душ. Чтобы пошла горячая вода нужно долго ждать. Она идет только через пару минут

sample_comments.title: Excellent hotel
sample_comments.text:
First time in Nha Trang, and I must say Vinpearl Luxury Hotel is truly splendid.

To reach Vinpearl Island, you can choose either a speedboat or the cable car. I opted for the cable car on the way there and the speedboat for the return journey---both were enjoyable experiences. Upon arriving at the Cable Car Station Reception Hall, you are immediately treated like a VIP.

One small thing to note is that it can be slightly confusing to locate the buggy car to your hotel at first. In fact, the buggy station is actually very close to the hotel, so no worries once you know where to go.

I chose the Beachfront Villa with a private pool, and I have absolutely no regrets. When you open your room door, you can see the main pool as well as the beach and the sea. The villa is extremely spacious, featuring a large and comfortable bed, electronic curtain controls, cool air-conditioning, dual vanity sinks, an electric toilet bowl, and the biggest bathtub I've ever used. A pleasant surprise was that they even provided my familiar Colgate toothpaste, along with indoor slippers and beach sandals---very thoughtful touches.

The resort boasts beautiful pools and a variety of water activities, perfect for both relaxation and fun. Breakfast offers a good variety of delicious options, including local favourites like pho and bánh mì. The fruits are especially sweet and fresh. A small tip: if you choose to sit outdoors at the restaurant, be mindful of the "commando birds" that may try to attack your food---make sure someone stays at the table at all times!

Do check out the Wave Bar as well. It features a unique, open and airy beachfront design with tropical-themed décor. The view is stunning---at night, you can admire the illuminated cable cars, and if you're lucky, even catch a glimpse of fireworks.

Lastly, I highly recommend trying Akoya Spa, which offers a truly unique experience. The spa huts are located in the middle of a freshwater lake, and the soothing sound of waves makes it incredibly easy to drift off into deep relaxation.

Overall, Vinpearl Luxury Hotel is highly recommended---a perfect blend of luxury, comfort, and unforgettable experiences.
sample_comments.room_type: Beachfront Villa with King Bed and Private Pool

It was honor for me to stay here. I would stay here longer if I knew this resort was like this.
I'd like to host another trip for my parents to stay in this resort if I have a chance.
If you are planning to visit Nha Trang, do not hesitate, stop wasting time to choose where to stay and to go.
Just pick this place, then you can enjoy everything you want.

sample_comments.title: Far Beyond Expectations
sample_comments.text:
My wife and I just returned from Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang, and it completely blew Sandals out of the water. Everything about this resort was exceptional --- the food, the service, the ambiance, and the way every detail was handled.
From the moment we arrived, we were treated like family. The beautiful welcome center offered cold drinks and air-conditioning right away, and the staff insisted we relax while they took care of everything. We never waited for a thing --- not food, golf carts, or boats. Everything ran like clockwork, but with a warmth and kindness that made it all feel effortless.
Two staff members in particular made our stay unforgettable:
 *** - He helped us several times during our stay and truly went above and beyond. He offered great suggestions, made sure our activities went smoothly, and shared how much he loves working for Vinpearl after 11 years. His professionalism and kindness stood out in every interaction.
 *** - Our breakfast hostess, whose smile and gentle manner started each day perfectly. She was so friendly and genuine that she even offered to take a photo with us because she could tell how much we appreciated her. She represents the heart of Vietnamese hospitality.
The entire resort runs like a well-oiled machine, yet every experience feels personal. We're already planning to cancel our next Sandals trip and return here next year instead.
Thank you, Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang, for an unforgettable stay --- this is true five-star hospitality done right.
--- Michael & Meghan Feeley

sample_comments.positives: Pláž... snídaně..
sample_comments.negatives: Celkem už starší vybavení pokoje.. celkem vysoká cena, v době pobytu byl rekonstruován bazén. Restaurace v hotelu celkem vysoké ceny, kvalita za tuto cenu neodpovídala... opravdu nic moc. Neporucujeme..

sample_comments.title: Please take good care of your wallet.
sample_comments.text: I left my wallet in the room, and while it's my fault, I only ended up losing the highest denomination bill among the many bills in it. I had generously tipped the room maid, and it seems that became the cause of my trouble. I feel like they saw me as an easy target because I'm Korean. The smell from the sofa and cushions is quite strong, and although it's called a resort, there are no kitchen facilities at all. Overall, the place has an oriental and antique atmosphere, so if you like the feel of a rich grandmother's house from your childhood, it might be enjoyable. I was glad there were no mosquitoes. However, the breakfast menu was the same for all three days, which became tedious by the second day. Some people say they only go to Vinpearl Luxury, but I'm not so sure. Also, I have young children, and there are no facilities or services related to kids at all, so I likely won't return. There's no reason for a revisit. The massage within the resort is truly top-notch. It's nice for just getting in the mood and taking pictures, but that's about it.

sample_comments.title: The accommodation that was the most satisfying during my trip to Nha Trang.
sample_comments.text:
I stayed at four places: Amiana, Nha Trang, Cam Ranh, Vinpearl Empire, and Vinpearl Luxury, and the one I was most satisfied with was the latter.

You can really feel a leisurely and quiet atmosphere. It felt like I had rented the incredibly large main pool almost exclusively. I could rent a swim scooter, an electric device you hold in your hand while swimming, and my child had a lot of fun with it. 
The fact that I could enjoy a private pool villa at an affordable price is also a big advantage. Although the pool wasn't very large, we could swim together privately, which my child said was the best. 
From my perspective, the best part was the spa! Everyone praised it so much that I booked a stay with a spa package, and it was the happiest moment during my nearly 10-day trip. It was so good that I felt like I was in heaven. When I tried to book the spa during check-in, there wasn't much time left, so matching the usage time was a bit challenging. I definitely recommend sending an email to make a reservation in advance. 
The breakfast was delicious, and I enjoyed eating in a relaxed atmosphere. Since the resort isn't large, there were fewer people, making everything even more satisfying. 
If you go to Vinpearl Island, be sure to choose Luxury!

sample_comments.title: As the name suggests, luxurious facilities and staff service.
sample_comments.text: It was truly a luxurious resort, just as the name suggests! I was planning to stay one night to use the VinWonders, and there were so many options it was hard to choose. However, considering my younger sibling and mom who love swimming, we decided on the Vinpearl Luxury with a pool villa room. Every staff member was kind from the boat waiting to the check-in and check-out, and especially the various employees within the resort were among the most friendly I have ever encountered! My mom absolutely loved the luxurious atmosphere, and the room was spacious enough for 2 adults and 1 child to sleep comfortably, with both the room and bathroom being very spacious. The swimming pools are all together, with varying depths; the children's pool and handball zone is 0.9 meters, which was great for playing, and the central pool of 1.8 meters was perfect for using life vests and various tubes! Next time, I definitely want to stay for more than two nights with family, a partner, or friends and have fun at the resort!

Dear Mr./Ms. GYEOLE

Thank you very much for choosing Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang and for sharing such a heartfelt and detailed review of your stay.

We are truly delighted to hear that your experience lived up to the name "Luxury," from the elegant pool villa to the exceptional hospitality provided by our team. It's wonderful to know that your family, especially your mother and younger sibling, enjoyed the spacious room, relaxing pool areas, and the warm, attentive service throughout your visit.

Your kind words are a great source of motivation for all of us, and we are honored to have created a memorable moment for your family. We sincerely hope to welcome you back soon for a longer stay, where you can fully enjoy everything our resort has to offer.

Yours very truly, Hotel Management of Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang

sample_comments.title: Not a Vinpearl Fan
sample_comments.positives: The rooms were excellent - we had a two storey villa with a private plunge pool. It was quiet and had a partial view of the beach. The beach and pool setting was very good.
sample_comments.negatives:
Service overall was extremely poor. The first day at lunch my husbands meal didn't arrive - there was no follow up and with 40 minutes waiting we cancelled his meal. The second day his meal arrived 20 minutes after mine, once I had finished. Food generally is always cold or luke warm at best. We also had two takeaway coffees one day, and we charged to the room because they couldn't take cash. They knocked on our door at 8pm to retrieve the 180,000 VND - not really expected in a 5 star resort.
The villa had electric curtains which mysteriously opened at 12.30am every night - to their credit they fixed it.
We also went to the other Vinpearl resort for lunch. The food was lovely however they double charged us on our credit card. They said they would refund us in 14 days. We demanded that we be refunded immediately as it wasn't our mistake. After an hour they gave us the money back in cash. Mistakes happen but just the way it was handled very poor.

sample_comments.title: Five star stay but with a few restraints
sample_comments.positives:
Quiet and very green. Personal pool at the villa is always a good addition to any holiday. 
Firm mattress for a good quality night sleep. 
The staff were exceptionally welcoming and accommodating. They even went an extra mile to help us with arrangements even after our check-out time. 
Breakfast food was tasty and varied, swimming pool - big and well maintained. And a special shout out goes to the nice ocean view from the gym windows.
sample_comments.negatives:
The interior is quite dated. But what was off putting is an old-looking carpet on the first floor. It would have been a better decision to leave the floors uncarpeted. The pool is also on the first floor. And you don't want to imagine what grows in between the fibres with the humidity from the pool, dirt from outside when you enter the room, and food remains after room service had been cleared. 
Although the two-storey villa is a nice place for a couple vacation, it is ill-suited for a family with kids. There are no doors in the bedroom on the second floor. The additional bed could only be placed on the first floor.

sample_comments.text: The hotel made my vacation really peaceful and relaxing. The quality of food and water was top notch. The staffs were super nice and the hotel leveled up my vacay!

sample_comments.title: Exceptional Service - Free Upgrade Made Our Trip!
sample_comments.text:
We always want to extend our stay at Vinpearl, and this time we managed to fit in a few extra days. Unfortunately, no villas were available at first - but the reception team didn't give up.

They called us last minute with good news: a garden villa had just opened up! We were happy to move, but after we paid, they surprised us with a complimentary upgrade and let us stay in our original beachfront villa.

It was such a thoughtful gesture and made our trip even more special. Huge thanks to the reception team - your excellent service is why we'll keep coming back!

sample_comments.negatives: The staff is really slow, you have to wait for drinks/food very long and some of them are not that friendly or make any effort. All in all it was no „luxury" feeling as promoted, other cheaper hotels in Vietnam have much better service.

sample_comments.title: It was so good.
sample_comments.text: The staff were very friendly, and since it was our honeymoon, they provided cake and a lettering service with room service, and checked if there were any inconveniences. The hygiene was clean, and I used a filtered showerhead with clean water. The breakfast was excellent, but the evening barbecue was a bit disappointing. There were too many bugs in the private pool, so I couldn't use it. However, the main pool was less crowded, and we had a lot of fun playing there. The beach water was clean, and above all, the spa was the best! Although it came at a price, it was a professional touch that ensured a good night's sleep. I want to go again!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. suna, 

Thank you for sharing your experience at the Vinpearl Luxury, Nha Trang. With a mission to provide superior customer service, we take great pride in serving your needs and are delighted to hear that we have met your expectations. 

As a valued customer, your feedback will be shared with the team to continue to inspire and motivate them to deliver exceptional customer service.

Our team looks forward to welcome you back to ''your home away from home''.  

Yours very truly,
Hotel Management of Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang
sample_comments.room_type: Beachfront Villa with King Bed and Private Pool

sample_comments.title: Beautiful resort and so much potential
sample_comments.positives:
Just spent 6 nights here and I have to say it's such a beautiful resort. It's in a perfect location with an amazing crystal clear beach. Huge pool! We stayed in a beachfront villa with a private pool and it was gorgeous. There's free buggy's to get you between Vin Harbour (shopping/food area) and also other resorts on the island. 
All the buggy drivers were so lovely and friendly.
Also outstanding service from Henry at the reception. He was so warm and welcoming and made us feel at home. He really knows his stuff!
sample_comments.negatives:
Unfortunately there was a few things that made us question whether we would return again or not.
1. Having to pay for the floaties at the pool. Other resorts have them for free and we spent a lot to stay there so was disappointing.
2. Most of the staff are wonderful, however some staff seem to be just doing bare minimum and just seem genuinely unhappy being there, as well as a feeling of disorganisation and rushing around at a simple request.
3. I was told off by one of the pool staff for taking a blue pool/beach towel to my room. I had to walk through my room soaking wet all over the floor to get my towel from the bathroom.
4. The atmosphere of the pool/beach area is not very enjoyable. There was music on one day the whole time I was there. Just makes the area feel sad and not very enjoyable which is a shame as it's such a beautiful area.
5. Only having one option for food down at the beach area. Every resort we've stayed at has a minimum of two food/beverage options. Not sure if the main restaurant is open during the day, but once again there's absolutely no atmosphere there. There's a bar located over the water near day spa which would've been amazing for lunch during the day, however didn't open till late in the afternoon.
6. Long wait times for food and drinks next to the pool when there was hardly anyone else around.
7. My husband tried taking one bottle of water after his workout at the gym and the lady working there told him he wasn't allowed to? This I find really frustrating.
8. Lastly housekeeping skipped our room for some reason one of the days and then came back around to us when our daughter was about to nap. We asked if they could come back when she woke up which they said was fine. They never came back so I asked reception to send someone in the afternoon, I was told they couldn't as there's a fee for housekeeping after 4pm, which is fair enough, however if they hadn't skipped us in the first place we wouldn't be in that situation.

sample_comments.title: I recommend Vinpearl Luxury.
sample_comments.text:
After considering a few options, I chose this resort... and my family also said it was a great choice.

Everyone was kind, and the breakfast was delicious. We could move around anytime in a buggy. During the day, we enjoyed the pool and the beach... and in the evening, we had a great time at the harbor^^

If the price includes the spa or the villa, I don't think it's expensive. I had the spa and breakfast included, and initially, I thought it was pricey, but I felt I received good service for the price^^
sample_comments.response:

sample_comments.title: The hotel is excellent; this isn't our first time staying here. We ran into a minor issue during check-in, but the staff
sample_comments.positives: The hotel is excellent; this isn't the first time we've stayed here. We had a minor issue when checking in, but the staff sorted it out straight away --- they're a truly professional team. And the birdsong outside the window in the mornings is simply delightful and creates a special holiday atmosphere. We'll definitely be back!
sample_comments.negatives: The only thing is that there was only a buffet in the evening; I would have liked to be able to order dishes from the à la carte menu as well.

sample_comments.title: We are going to enjoy our honeymoon~!
sample_comments.text:
Last year, we spent it at a resort, and this year we booked luxury for our honeymoon, and I have no regrets with the private accommodation and service!

The massage with a view of the sea was great, and the pool was spacious, so I was satisfied.

On the first day, we dined at the restaurant, which only had traditional Vietnamese food, so opinions varied. The next day, we looked for a good restaurant at the harbor and went there for a meal. Haha.

I enjoyed experiencing Vinpearl again with a completely different concept.

sample_comments.title: Very nice relaxing holidays
sample_comments.positives:
The location was fantastic, with the hotel's own shuttles, the cable car or the boat you are on the mainland in no time.
You can reach the harbor, where there are numerous restaurants and stores, by shuttle and then by escalator in 5 minutes.
Vin wonder can be reached in 2 minutes by shuttle.
The breakfast is excellent. A large selection for every taste.
The staff at the hotel were extremely friendly. 
Even with the smallest problem we were helped immediately.
Jun in particular, our personal guest advisor, was always there for us, even when he wasn't on duty he responded promptly to our questions via whatsapp. But the ladies at reception also helped us in all matters. 
The terrace with private pool, which is also covered, is very nice in the hotel. That was a big plus on the few rainy days. The room is very large and comfortable. 
There are hardly any people at the public pools and the beach. We thought that was great, it was very quiet and relaxing.
We can definitely recommend this hotel
sample_comments.negatives:
The price-performance ratio in the restaurant is not justified. It is very expensive compared to the restaurants at the harbor or on the mainland.
3 small things that we have already mentioned at the hotel:
1. there are no small tables by the sun loungers
2. there are no showers at the pools. These are only on the beach
3. it would be nice if the upper small pool was designated as a quiet pool with a sign and the lower large pool, where there is also a lot of swimming equipment for children, as an activity pool

sample_comments.title: It's perfect as a honeymoon destination.
sample_comments.text:
Nha Trang chosen for our honeymoon
Especially among the resorts on Vinpearl Island, we wanted a villa with a pool, and Vinpearl Luxury is exactly that.
Every room has a private pool, and the Akoya Spa is wonderful, plus there's a large swimming pool and even a wave bar on the private beach~
We stayed for two nights, and we didn't get to use everything, so I'm really disappointed.
The staff were extremely friendly, and it's great that we can use Vin Wonders with a guest discount.
I would love to use it again next time.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. jiyoung,

We are truly humbled and inspired by your generous review of Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang. Knowing that our bespoke service contributed to your memorable stay warms our hearts and reinforces our commitment to excellence.

The entire team looks forward to your return to our exclusive and sophisticated destination, where every visit is unforgettable.

Warmest regards,
Hotel Management of Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang

sample_comments.title: Magical stay at a luxury resort. Can't wait to return.
sample_comments.positives: Beautiful huge property with amazing staff. Steve, Henry and Danny were all incredibly helpful and kind. We got a room upgrade for our honeymoon and for my partner's birthday and they left us a cake as well. Enormous communal pool as well as a lovely private pool. Multitudes of free water and a fair price for the stay, especially as it included entry to the VinWonders park as well as commutes there and back.
sample_comments.negatives: Our shower seemed to lack hot water and the private pool possibly had too many chemicals in it. Would have loved to see a happy hour advertised but all in all was an awesome stay.

sample_comments.title: Family trip
sample_comments.text: The accommodation is very beautiful, the view is great, and the price is good. The kids really liked it. We will definitely come back during the holiday. The staff also provided good service. I liked everything very much and I'm very impressed.

sample_comments.text:
I deliberately chose a small scale accommodation due to being overwhelmed with work, and it was peaceful, quiet, and relaxing. I purchased the ticket for Gardens by the Bay at the reception, and I was pleasantly surprised by their attentiveness to check the weather before selling me the ticket. The breakfast was also really delicious (coffee, pho, yogurt, mango, etc.).

However, when going to the harbor or returning from Gardens by the Bay to the accommodation, there were no other guests taking the buggy besides us, so while other accommodations had 4 to 5 buggies coming and going, we had to sit alone on a bench and wait a bit, which was a little disappointing.

Other than that, it was very relaxed and absolutely wonderful.

sample_comments.title: Perfect hotel
sample_comments.positives:
The welcome on the mainland is very well organized, and the lobby is stunning. You can get there either by cable car or speedboat - both excellent options. The cable car offers a breathtaking view of the complex, a truly enchanting bubble outside of time.
We booked a room with a private pool - beautifully designed, perfectly tempered, and fully equipped. The hotel shuttle cart service is very convenient for reaching the port, where you can enjoy various shops and restaurants at the park entrance.
The breakfast was excellent, the pools were gorgeous, and the sandy beach was a peaceful haven.
A big thank you to the entire staff , especially to Loc, for their warm welcome, kindness, and professionalism. Highly recommend this hotel!
sample_comments.negatives: The only minor drawback was the gym, which was not sufficiently air-conditioned, making it challenging to work out during the day.

sample_comments.title: I had such a happy time in Nha Trang.
sample_comments.text:
The first thing I chose for my trip to Nha Trang, which lasted 4 nights and 5 days, was accommodation. I went with Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang. Even if I were to go back to the point of choosing accommodation again, I would choose the same place. It's not easy to expect very kind service when arriving at the accommodation after 12 o'clock, but we received such service. There was a small issue, but a very nice staff member who spoke Korean took measures that ensured our satisfaction. 
The swimming pool and the private beach, along with the spa we chose as part of the package, really elevated our satisfaction to the highest level. Enjoying a spa while listening to the sound of the waves at the beach during the last evening time perfectly relieved all the fatigue of the day. 
There are even a harbor and amusement park that we could enjoy without leaving the resort. However, taking a speedboat out to the not-so-distant city had an ethnic charm that made us feel satisfied. The whole family was so pleased that we promised to return.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. 도형,

sample_comments.room_type: Garden View Villa with King Bed and Private Pool

sample_comments.title: Lovely resort, already planning a return trip
sample_comments.positives:
Location was stunning; room was spacious and immaculately clean; wifi worked perfectly; breakfast was particularly good offering a wide range of options to meet dietary needs (including vegans); staff were helpful and friendly. Transport around the resort is easy and transport to the mainland by speedboat and/or cable car is frequent and easily accessible. 

I thought long and hard about an ocean view villa and ended up going with the cheaper garden view. We were not disappointed at all. In fact, there were advantages to the garden view villa i.e. quieter and more privacy - there's a walking path to the pool/beach that goes past the ocean view rooms and so people can see in if the lights are on and curtains are open.
sample_comments.negatives:
There were a few things that puzzled us, but these were minor and didn't really affect our stay...

The check-in process involved lots of waiting around. We checked-in on the mainland, then got a speedboat to the island, then a buggy to the resort, then checked-in again only to be sent away for 2-3 hours until our room was ready.

The on-site restaurant for dinner is a seafood restaurant so not good for vegans. There was another on-site restaurant but we couldn't find a menu or opening hours.

There were a few communication issues e.g. we were told at check-in we could use our room credit towards room service (which had vegan options), but when we tried to do this on our last night we were told we couldn't (I note this was resolved and the duty manager apologised profusely). 

The resort has a strict policy on bringing in food from outside (attracting a US$50 fine); but we couldn't get a sensible answer about what this meant or how it was enforced - we were initially told packaged food from convenience stores was OK but on one occasion we had water bottles confiscated at the cable car terminal and on another our bags were searched for food but our water bottles were allowed.

Our only other issue was with finding out information about facilities on the island - we asked if there was a map of the island and were told there wasn't. We also couldn't find out what was at VinWonders. VinPearl Harbour made us scratch our heads - it was like a ghost town with lots of fake shop fronts and no people. We weren't sure if things were closed because of the rain, or because it was off-season or if it was still under construction.

sample_comments.title: FABULOUS
sample_comments.text:
Good location, good service, good value for money. Super friendly staff, 6 stars for me. Everything was great. Love this place and the people. We will definitely come back. A great place to stay.
-----------
Vị trí tốt, dịch vụ tốt, đáng giá tiền. Nhân viên siêu thân thiện, với tôi thì đây là nơi 6 sao. Mọi thứ đều tuyệt vời. Yêu nơi này và con người ở đây. Chúng tôi chắc chắn sẽ quay lại. Một nơi đáng để ở.

sample_comments.positives:
Breakfast was worse than I expected. There were four big chafing dishes all filled with rise. Rise rise again rise... few food choices. My daughter couldn't find any nice food. She just ate yoghurts and some fried pork. 
Pho soup was very good.
sample_comments.negatives: Too few choices. Maybe I'm comparing it to my previous hotel Vinpearl nha trang Bay's breakfast.

sample_comments.title: It was a resort with a quiet and cozy atmosphere.
sample_comments.text: I stayed at a resort near the airport and a small hotel in the city, but the best resort was Vinpearl Luxury. It was small in size but felt quiet and cozy, and I especially liked the large central swimming pool. The staff were generally friendly and warm. As a pregnant woman, I wanted to avoid cigarette smoke as much as possible, but it was disappointing to see other guests smoking in places like the benches by the pool instead of in front of their own homes. However, compared to the city of Nha Trang or other streets, there were relatively few people smoking freely on Vinpearl Island, which was nice. It would have been great if the restaurant within the resort that serves dinner had a menu in Korean. I really enjoyed being able to eat a lot of mango at breakfast.

sample_comments.title: Fantastic resort, truly luxurious.
sample_comments.positives: This is a real luxury hotel. The pick up from the airport was exceptionally good - very attentive and what you would expect. I think the check in process was a bit daunting - you have to register on the mainland and then get to the resort, we went by cable car and found it a bit hard to follow the instructions. But once we arrived at the luxury resort (there are numerous resorts in the same island) it all came good - very well appointed villa, fantastic private beach, lots of courteous efficient staff, luxury fixtures and fittings, lots of loungers and reasonable prices for food and drink.
sample_comments.negatives: I would recommend that people who book the luxury resort are advised to take the speed boats to the island rather than the cable car because the transfer is much easier.

sample_comments.title: "If you are looking for a comfortable rest"
sample_comments.text:
My wife and I, who arrived a day later than the group of six, found our hearts at ease upon coming to this new resort. 
1. From the dock at Vinpearl, the kindness and hospitality of the staff made us feel very comfortable. 
2. During check-in at the resort, we were grateful for the friendly explanation from the guide who had self-taught Korean through YouTube, and riding the cart while he personally explained the resort made us feel "valued." 
3. The hotel where we stayed for three nights was well-prepared with beautifully organized items, and seeing my wife's expression change brightly while listening to the guide's explanation---especially after her mother-in-law had passed away a few days prior---made me thankful once more. 
4. On the second and third mornings, swimming leisurely alone in the beautiful pool felt like "my pool," and I enjoyed the serenity, thinking, "This is what relaxation is." 
5. We had breakfast at the resort, but went out for the rest of our meals in Nha Trang city, alternating between the boat and cable car (which was obviously free) to enjoy the romance, especially the beautiful night view from the cable car when returning at night. 
6. My wife was so delighted every evening with the fireworks that simply watching her made me happy too. 
7. After having breakfast three times, I could certainly feel that the ingredients were selected with great care and the 'taste' was also top-notch. 
8. I want to express my heartfelt gratitude to all the staff at the resort through this writing, and for anyone considering using this resort, I am confident they "will not regret it at all."
Once again, I convey my thanks.
It was an incredibly wonderful memory.

sample_comments.title: Awesome relaxing holiday in a beautiful spot
sample_comments.positives: The location is superb; it's very tranquil once you're away from Vinpearl Harbour and is only a short cable car or speedboat ride across to the mainland. The resort really is a luxury resort. The private beach and resort pool are very well maintained. The rooms are stunning. The Wave Bar has a great view. Staff are friendly and professional. I'd particularly like to mention the staff at the spa, where we spent quite a bit of time. All of the staff were exceptional, but Hong Diem and Thuy Tien deserve a special mention. Thank you so much!
sample_comments.negatives: Apart from the breakfast buffet which has lots of vegan options, there is little in the way of vegan and/or vegetarian food on the room service menu or in the restaurant, and it is expensive by Vietnamese standards (although this is expected at 5-star resorts). Coupled with not being able to bring food across from the mainland, this can make meals challenging for vegans and requires lots of trips back and forth to Nha Trang where there are many vegan restaurants. Some of the staff at the resort don't speak much English which can lead to misunderstandings on occasion.

sample_comments.title: A perfect vacation with Vinpearl Luxury.
sample_comments.text:
While planning my trip to Nha Trang, I heard about Vinpearl Luxury from an acquaintance and ended up making a reservation, which I was ultimately satisfied with.

First of all, getting onto the island might seem a bit annoying at first, but taking the ferry gave me the feeling that my vacation had started right away, which was nice.

From the moment we entered Vinpearl Island, the staff was there to help us without needing to carry our luggage, and they greeted us warmly everywhere we went. There was a private swimming pool, and when we checked in, leaves were floating in the water, which the staff promptly cleaned up. The outdoor pool was about 180cm deep and great for swimming, and they provided life jackets and tubes for free.

Breakfast varied slightly each day during our two-night stay, and the pho and mango were truly delicious! I also recommend booking the package that includes a massage. The ambiance and massage skills I experienced during my time in Nha Trang were the best I've ever had; however, the regular price for massages seemed a bit expensive.

This was my first overseas trip in my life, and thanks to the Vinpearl Luxury Resort and the staff, I have truly wonderful memories.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. 랑말,

We are truly humbled and inspired by your generous review of Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang. Knowing that our bespoke service contributed to your memorable stay warms our hearts and reinforces our commitment to excellence.

The entire team looks forward to your return to our exclusive and sophisticated destination, where every visit is unforgettable.

Warmest regards,
Hotel Management of Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang

sample_comments.title: Great hotel and location
sample_comments.positives: Amazing hotel and facilities
sample_comments.negatives: Private pool in shade and pool not very warm

sample_comments.title: This resort is incredible
sample_comments.text: We are absolutely blown away by this resort and the entire Vinpearl island. We have high standards and the resort and island have gone above and beyond them. We weren't sure how the transfer from the mainland across to the island would be but from the moment we arrived at the cable car station, the process was incredibly seamless and we felt like we were being treated like royalty. Vinpearl know what they're doing here. They greeted us with a welcome drink at the station which is like a hotel reception for all Vinpearl hotels on steroids. They handled our check in and took our bags, offered us cable car or speed boat transfer, registered our face recognition to allow seamless travel between island and mainland for the duration of our stay, and we boarded the cable car with no waiting. Beautiful journey across. Then we were picked up by a buggy who took us to our hotel and check in was completed, hotel tour on a buggy was provided and our room was so beautiful. The next morning at breakfast the lovely staff brought us a heart shape cake for our wedding anniversary and it was just so sweet. They are extremely hospitable, kind, happy and thoughtful here. The resort facilities are amazing, large nice pool, restaurants, and quick access to Vinpearl Harbour which also blew us away. So many shops and restaurants and massage spas at our fingertips with activities to do. We will never get bored here. Breakfast was also fantastic. We are having the best trip here and we love Vietnam!!! Thank you Vinpearl!!!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. Lauren,

It was an honor to host you at Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang, where we strive to create experiences that are unique, intimate, and personal. We hope this visit marks the beginning of a long-lasting relationship as our loyal guest.

Your gracious review affirms our dedication to providing a stay that is not just luxurious but truly exceptional. We are delighted to know that our team and services met and surpassed your expectations.

We hope that you will get another inspiring and unforgettable journey.

Warmest regards,
Hotel Management of Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang

sample_comments.title: Absolutely amazing place, fantastic service
sample_comments.positives: I travel a lot and usually i find some things i am not happy about but the stay in this hotel exceeded my expectations, it was just amazing. Fantastic, greatly-trained and always super helpful and friendly staff, perfect breakfast, cool villa a with a private pool, all super clean. The private beach was also great, very nice view all around. I recommend this hotel to all who require great, professional service with staff looking after you as if were a king :). This kind of service that felt genuine and attention to details i would only expect in hotels like Mandarin Oriental or Four Seasons, but surprisingly I also found it in Vinpearl Luxury Hotel. Thank you to all the staff and also to the management, all i can say is bravooo. I forgot to mention the spa, we had a massage every day of our stay and it was superb too.

sample_comments.title: Exceeded all my expectations
sample_comments.positives: I must say it exceeded all my expectations! The breakfast was absolutely divine - a delicious spread. The grounds were immaculately maintained, with beautifully manicured gardens and a tranquil atmosphere that was perfect for relaxation. And let's not forget the beach - it was spacious and unspoiled, with crystal-clear waters that lapped gently against the shore. My room was spacious and comfortable, with all the amenities I needed to feel right at home. Overall, I had an unforgettable stay and would highly recommend this resort to anyone looking for a peaceful getaway.
sample_comments.negatives: I'd recommend adding more buggies to reduce the wait time for transfers, and also consider installing heated pool water as it would be a plus. Water in the pool is cold.

sample_comments.title: A luxury boutique resort most beautifully situated on it's own private stretch of beach.
sample_comments.positives:
The resort is small and boutique, but from the moment we arrived we were treated like royalty,and the staff couldn't do enough for us.
We were greeted at the entrance and given a nice cold welcome drink before being shown to our luxurious villa.
We were blown away with the sheer luxury and overall cleanliness..there was a control panel to operate the curtains and lighting, and we had our own pool in the garden.
Every thought had been put into making our holiday stand out as one of the best ever !
The beach area,although very near to Vinpearl harbour,was beautifully kept,and we could relax on a sumptuous day bed with curtains around it.
The Wave bar served a variety of drinks and mocktails, being situated on a wooden pier with circular seating affording superb views of the harbour where we could watch the evening fireworks. 
One of the managers, a man called Dung, was particularly helpful with his advice and knowledge of the island,which made our stay even more special. 

We will definitely be coming back !

sample_comments.title: Exceptional service and peaceful location
sample_comments.text: Outstanding service, peaceful location and excellent facilities. Vinwonders was certainly one of the highlights. The breakfast and dinner buffets offer a wide variety of dishes, pho was absolutely delicious! Initially, we were there for 4 nights, but then decided to extend a further 3 as we were so impressed with everything! A big thank-you to the customer service team for making our family trip so peaceful, pleasant and memorable. We will see you soon!

sample_comments.title: Instead of Khamran, Vinpearl.
sample_comments.text: I didn't use the Vinpearl Theme Park, but the island itself is so beautiful that just taking the cable car felt like a holiday, highly recommended! Above all, there were not many guests, so it was possible to relax, and the breakfast was much tastier than that at the InterContinental! The pool was fun as it was deep and wide at 1.8 meters! Even though outside food is not allowed, it was okay~ In the evening, go to Vinpearl Harbor and have a beer at Meo Kitchen hehe, it's great value for money~ The massage was quite strong, but I didn't feel like they understood human anatomy well, which was disappointing, and the sauna next door was excellent. The usage time felt too short at just over 40 minutes. It would be good if it could be 50 minutes to an hour hehe. There wasn't enough time for a shower and to dry my hairㅠㅠ Anyway, I stayed at three places: December, InterContinental, and Vinpearl Luxury, but I am definitely willing to revisit only Vinpearl Luxury! The disappointing points are that while it's a pool villa, the private pool was in a condition that couldn't be used even for a moment, and while the sea looked clean from outside, there was too much trash like plastic bags inside. Also, there were additional charges for tube rentals besides life jackets, which should have been free enough...

sample_comments.title: A quiet yet not boring place to live.
sample_comments.text: Personally, I prefer the countryside, so while looking for a villa with a pool on Vinpearl Island, I ended up here and had an extremely happy time. The breakfast was excellent, the staff's manners were pleasant, and the condition of the accommodation was great. (Of course, there were many lizards... haha) The pool inside the accommodation had a lot of leaves falling over time, so I only used it on the first day... I had an enjoyable time without getting bored as there were many experiences to be had on Vinpearl Island!! And the sincerity and warmth from Koah and Thang are what I remember the most! I plan to come back to meet good staff and accommodation again. haha I think it would be great to come with my family next time.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful luxurious stay
sample_comments.positives: Very comfortable hotel in a quiet, serene setting. Huge beautiful pool and stunning white sand beaches. Seafood dishes were amazing and the Wave Bar is an excellent place for evening drinks.

sample_comments.title: This is the best option for fun.
sample_comments.text:
It takes about 10 to 15 minutes to get to the city center from the cable car station, and the Grab fare is around 4,000 to 5,000 won. One of the advantages of this accommodation is that the staff are very friendly, but I also think the geographical advantage of being relatively close to the city center compared to other resorts is quite significant. Of course, you have to take a buggy to the dock to catch a speedboat that runs every 30 minutes, or take the cable car to leave the island and catch a Grab, so the actual time to get from the accommodation to the city center is at least 30 minutes. Although Nha Trang isn't overflowing with activities, it is still attractive. Furthermore, the biggest advantage of Vinpearl accommodation is that there are far more things to enjoy than in downtown Nha Trang. If you go to the city, you'll just have to deal with bargaining at markets that aren't fixed price, and there aren't that many attractions around, so most activities are exhausted in a day or two. However, at Vinpearl Nha Trang, there are endless entertainment options. Even at the harbor, which you can access for free if you stay at the Vinpearl accommodation, there are various shows and performances provided for free, and although prices are slightly more expensive than the night market, the quality of what you can experience at that location, which you can easily access by buggy from the accommodation, is impressive. The harbor alone offers this much, and in the case of luxury accommodation, there is a 20% discount on the VinWonders ticket for full-day visits (not valid on check-in and check-out days), allowing you to use it for about 760,000 VND. We used the afternoon ticket after 4 PM for scuba diving, but unfortunately, this wasn't discounted, and the price was 660,000 VND, which is about 3.5 times the amount in Korean won. Even if you arrive after 4 PM, you can enjoy the zoo and botanical garden (open until 5:30 PM), aquarium (open until 7 PM), and enjoy the fountain show (7 PM) and the Tata show (7:30 PM), so there is plenty to see and enjoy; if you want to ride on attractions as well, I recommend the full-day ticket. Although the storyline of the Tata show is somewhat cliché, it boasts significant scale and impressive technology that utilizes the castle itself as a screen. If you want to enjoy Nha Trang beyond the city, I strongly recommend staying at the Vinpearl Hotel. The breakfast is just average. If I had to point out a downside, it would be that since the accommodation is located in nature, it sometimes allows lizards and other creatures to share the space (although it's not as extreme as what one might find on the internet, you might occasionally see them, and there seem to be some mosquitoes in the evening). Also, the connection among the staff isn't that solid; it seems there are so many staff members. For scuba diving, the diving team docks the boat on the island, but it was difficult to know exactly where to go, and when I arrived at the dock and asked where to go, they told me to head to the cable car at the harbor, which caused a bit of confusion. But it wasn't a major issue. Not all the staff speak English well, but at the reception or front desk, there are typically at least 1 or 2 people who are very proficient, so as long as you can communicate in English, you can have a very comfortable experience. 

As I write this, I also remember the pool and the beach; the pool in front of the accommodation varies in depth from 0.9m to 1.8m, and the beach right in front is like the sea from a movie or photo, with emerald waters and fish swimming, making it incredibly beautiful and a heavenly place. Willingness to return: 100%. If you feel there aren't as many activities in the city as you expected, come to Vinpearl Nha Trang.

sample_comments.title: True healing stay at Vinpearl Luxury.
sample_comments.text: We had a wonderful time for 3 nights and 4 days with 2 adults and 2 children. The environmentally friendly accommodation, comfortable facilities, and the attractions at Vin Wonders and the harbor were all great, and especially, the staff were very kind which made us very satisfied. We had many inquiries and requests because of the children, but they always do their best to help us. In particular, Mr. Tuan Viet, who was in charge of our family, took warm care of our safety and comfort from start to finish, which touched us. I felt like I want to travel to Vietnam again in the future and would like to stay at Vinpearl Luxury Nha Trang again. We truly rested well and ate well during the 3 nights and 4 days (I forgot to mention breakfast. It was really the best! ) It's truly a healing experience. Thank you very much. ^^

sample_comments.title: Amazing
sample_comments.text: This one is the best in Vietnam. If you would like to have quiet time on the empty white sand beach and big clean swimming pools, choose this hotel: great spacious villas in the mango garden, yummy breakfasts, and A-level staff. I want to express my respect to the hotel manager, Chris, who came to breakfast daily to greet guests; our personal always smiling assistant, Hani, who was answering all our questions via WhatsApp immediately and did the best for us; and even the car driver (or more?) Steve, who went the extra mile and unexpectedly took our photos on the beach. Additionally worthy of note is the spa: thank the therapists Thao, Diep, and Giau for the amazing Vietnamese massages. Also, we had dinner in the hotel restaurant twice, which was delicious. Everyone in this hotel went above and beyond to create a unique atmosphere---the hidden gem for couples on Vinpearl Island.

sample_comments.title: Paradise revisited
sample_comments.text: This is our second visit to Vinpearl Luxury and just like the last time, it was nothing short of fantastic! The resort is incredible, peacefully located with everything you'd expect from a 5* property. You'll find a more in depth review posted in February this year for further information. I wanted to take this opportunity to commend the team who work tirelessly to ensure your stay in as luxurious an experience as possible, in particular, Hani, Henry, Thang, Maine, Steve and Viet. These six individuals went above and beyond in their efforts to look after us! Always with a smile on their faces, they would take the time to ask us about our day, what our plans were and what they could do to make our stay better! Our stay at Vinpearl would have been enjoyable without the attention of these six genuine people however, there being there turned it from just an enjoyable experience to a truly memorable one! Our heartfelt thanks to you all and Christoph the GM, for maintaining the high standards! You will definitely see us for a third time!

sample_comments.title: Half the price of Marriott, with a private beach and standalone villas.
sample_comments.text: The hotel is the closest among several hotels on the island to the shopping street and amusement park. If you want to experience a tranquil and leisurely vacation, waking up every day to the blue sea and sky outside your window, and the price is half that of the Marriott hotel on the same island, I highly recommend this luxurious hotel! It's less crowded, quiet, has a great atmosphere at the seaside bar, and offers thoughtful service. The room I booked also included a complimentary couple's oil massage, allowing me to enjoy an ultimate relaxation experience while listening to the sound of waves crashing on the shore, feeling like paradise on earth! The front desk concierge, Hani, was particularly enthusiastic, providing attentive and detailed service, radiating emotional value, and she is a lively and cute high-profile beauty, making it hard not to like her! My trip to Nha Trang during the Dragon Boat Festival was unforgettable because of this perfect experience, and I promised my husband that we will come back next time!

sample_comments.title: The best resort
sample_comments.text: We stayed for three nights on our honeymoon. The facilities, meals, and staff responses were all exceptional; from the pick-up before check-in to the checkout, everything was comfortable, and we didn't have a single unpleasant experience. As we're not very proficient in English, we had some anxiety about staying in a foreign land, but the concierge always provided the best services and considerations, which made us feel at ease. We chose an ocean view room, and being just 10 seconds from the beach, the sound of the waves was delightful. We were also pleased with the strong water pressure in the shower. It was a place where you could relax by the beach, go to the spa, visit a theme park, or take a cable car or boat to the neon-lit city; it fulfilled all our desires for a resort stay. We would love to stay again.

sample_comments.title: It can't be more private than this. Highly recommend the spa. The best service from the staff.
sample_comments.text:
I was deeply moved by the heartfelt service!!! I've stayed at many 5-star hotels, but the pride and service of the staff were exceptional!! 
Especially Henry. Thank you so much!!! 
You will become an excellent hotelier!!! Thanks to you, my trip was fulfilling emotionally! Thank you.

I always use pools and pool villas for relaxation, and although I booked a room with a pool, I never got to go in because there was an even more private and spacious pool and spa!!! I absolutely recommend the spa for 90 minutes. I requested an extra 60 minutes, but unfortunately couldn't due to subsequent bookings!! It was so much better than city spas, highly recommended!! I wish I could take it to Korea!! 
It was so private that I truly enjoyed my relaxation!! 
The breakfast was also fantastic! Rather than having many tasteless options, I was able to taste high-quality food and recharge!! I plan to visit again!! 
I think I didn't take good photos, the actual room feels much better!!! :-) 
Oh! I was worried about running out of water, so I brought three 1.5-liter bottles from the city, but I left all of them behind. They generously provide more than enough. When you hear the doorbell and open it, they give you more water and snacks, haha! They are very attentive and thoughtful. I was very grateful!!
